message:
feat: witness polecat failure tracking for convoy issues (gt-cfq)

Add Mountain-Eater Layer 1: when a polecat exits without completing its
hooked bead, check if the issue belongs to a convoy. For mountain convoys,
increment a failure count (mountain:failures:N label) and auto-skip
(mark blocked + mountain:skipped) after 3 failures. For regular convoys,
log a warning.

Integrated into DetectZombiePolecats — after collecting all zombies,
trackConvoyFailures processes each zombie with an active hook_bead
(excluding ZombieBeadClosedStillRunning since the work was completed).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
